All rights reserved. @@ -13991,2 +13991,2 @@ - When preview features are enabled and a value object is allocated, the null - is passed for the parameter. + When preview features are enabled and an allocated object has no identity, the + null is passed for the parameter. @@ -14039,1 +14039,1 @@ - Null when preview features are enabled and a value object was allocated. + Null when preview features are enabled and an allocated object has no identity. @@ -14086,3 +14086,3 @@ - When preview features are enabled and a value object is allocated, the null - is passed for the parameter. - Note that value objects are not supported by weak references. + When preview features are enabled and an allocated object has no identity, the + null is passed for the parameter. + Note that weak references support identity objects only. @@ -14113,1 +14113,1 @@ - Null when preview features are enabled and a value object was allocated. + Null when preview features are enabled and an allocated object has no identity.
